name: Fullgoal CSI Medical thm Enhed Idx(LOF)
summary: Fullgoal CSI Medical thm Enhed Idx(LOF) is a fund that tracks the performance of the CSI Medical Theme Index. It provides investors with exposure to companies in the medical and healthcare industry in China. It is managed by Fullgoal Fund Management Co., Ltd. and is available as a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF).
